name: Channel Mapparr
description: Standardizes broadcast (OTA) and premium/cable channel names using network data and channel lists. Supports M3U stream import, category organization, and fuzzy matching across 42K+ channels in 11 countries.
author: PiratesIRC

fields.label: Channel Databases
fields.help_text: Comma-separated country codes to load. Supported: US, UK, CA, AU, BR, DE, ES, FR, MX, NL, IN. Example: 'US, UK, CA'. Drives which channel JSON files are used for matching AND which tv-logos directories the per-channel logo action queries.

fields.label: Match Sensitivity

options.label: Relaxed — more matches, more false positives

fields.help_text: Minimum similarity score required for a stream/channel to be considered a match. 'Normal' (80) suits most providers. Bump to 'Strict' if you see wrong-channel matches; drop to 'Relaxed' only on clean, well-named lineups.

fields.label: Channel Groups to Process
fields.help_text: Comma-separated Dispatcharr channel group names. Leave blank to process ALL groups. Example: 'Sports, News, Movies'.

fields.label: Category Organization Groups
fields.help_text: Comma-separated group names the Organize-by-Category action is allowed to create or move channels into. Leave blank to use the categories defined in the channel database JSON.

fields.label: M3U Source
fields.help_text: Which M3U account(s) the M3U import reads streams from. '_all' uses every active source; otherwise pick one. Dropdown is populated from Dispatcharr's M3U Accounts at load time.

fields.label: M3U Group Filter
fields.help_text: Comma-separated M3U group-title values to include during import. Leave blank to import all groups.

fields.label: Category Filter
fields.help_text: Comma-separated category names (from the channel database) to import. Leave blank to import all categories matched by streams.

fields.label: Custom Import Group Name
fields.help_text: Optional group name to assign to channels created by M3U import. Leave blank to use category-based naming.

fields.label: OTA Name Format
fields.help_text: Template for broadcast (over-the-air) channel names. Available tokens: {NETWORK}, {STATE}, {CITY}, {CALLSIGN}. Example: 'ABC - NY New York (WABC-TV)'.

fields.label: Unknown Channel Suffix
fields.help_text: Suffix appended to channels the matcher couldn't identify. Used by the Tag Unknown Channels action. Include a leading space if you want one.

fields.label: Ignored Tags
fields.help_text: Comma-separated tags stripped from stream/channel names before matching. Use brackets/parens for literal matches (e.g. '[HD]', '(PRIME)'); bare words are matched on word boundaries.

fields.label: Default Logo
fields.help_text: Name (case-insensitive) of a logo in Dispatcharr's Logo Manager. Used by the Apply Default Logo action. For per-channel logos use the tv-logos action instead.

fields.label: Dry Run Mode
fields.help_text: When ON, mutating actions (Rename, Organize, Import) export a CSV preview to /data/exports/ instead of writing to the database. Recommended for first-time use of new settings.

fields.label: Rate Limiting
fields.help_text: Throttles database writes during bulk operations. 'None' is safe for SSD/local DBs; raise if you see DB lock errors or are running on shared/slow storage.

actions.label: Validate Settings
actions.description: Check database connectivity, channel databases, and settings before running any action.

actions.label: Load & Process Channels
actions.description: Scan channel groups and determine standardized names.

actions.label: Rename Channels
actions.description: Apply standardized names to processed channels. Dry Run exports a CSV preview instead.

confirm.message: This will rename channels to the standardized format. This action is irreversible. Continue?

actions.label: Tag Unknown Channels
actions.description: Append the configured suffix to unmatched OTA and premium channels.

confirm.message: This will append the configured suffix to unmatched channels. Continue?

actions.label: Apply Default Logo
actions.description: Assign the configured default logo to channels that don't have one.

confirm.message: This will apply the default logo to channels without a logo. Continue?

actions.label: Apply Per-Channel Logos (tv-logos)
actions.description: Fuzzy-match each channel name to the tv-logo/tv-logos GitHub repo and assign per-channel logos. Uses the country codes from Channel Databases. Channels with an existing logo are left alone.

confirm.message: This will fetch tv-logos and assign per-channel logos to channels without one. Continue?

actions.label: Organize by Category
actions.description: Move channels into category-based groups. Dry Run exports a CSV preview.

confirm.message: This will create new groups (if needed) and move channels to category-based groups. Continue?

actions.label: Import M3U Streams
actions.description: Create channels from M3U streams organized by category. Runs in background. Dry Run exports a CSV preview.

confirm.message: This will create new channels from M3U streams and organize them into groups. Duplicates get suffixes. Continue?

actions.label: Show Status
actions.description: Show live progress and ETA for the most recent or running operation. Reads a persistent progress file so you can check without watching container logs.

actions.label: Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all CSV export files created by this plugin.

confirm.message: Delete all Channel Mapparr CSV exports?
